summary: Completed testing of Reports feature - all 8 report types, operator scoping, customer blocking, and UI components. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend reports.py: Well-structured with 8 report generators pulling real data from MongoDB orders/ratings/support_tickets collections
Frontend SystemReports.jsx: Clean implementation with Visual/Data toggle, Download dropdown (JSON/CSV), and operator scope selector for admins
Route protection correctly configured: admin and operator roles allowed, customer blocked
test_credentials: admin@test.com / testpassword123, operator@test.com / testpassword123, customer@test.com / testpassword123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports feature fully tested. All 8 report types (booking-report, revenue-analysis, financial-summary, customer-insights, operational-efficiency, service-performance, customer-satisfaction, booking-analytics) return real data from MongoDB. Admin can scope by operator, operators see only their data (shows 'No data' if no orders exist for their operator_id), customers are blocked (403 from API, blank page from frontend route protection).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - Feature implementation testing, no bugs found
